regional_cost_note: Plumbers in Christchurch typically charge $90–$130/hr. Emergency callouts add $80–$150. Post-earthquake, many firms have strong experience in pipe replacement and reticulation.

businesses.name: Woods plumbing Limited
businesses.known_for: 15 years experience delivering plumbing, gas services, kitchens and bathrooms and drainlaying with fully stocked vans for same-day solutions.

businesses.name: Bigelow Plumbing Ltd
businesses.known_for: Diverse range of plumbing, gasfitting and drainage work across Banks Peninsula, Christchurch, Selwyn and Waimakariri.

businesses.name: Discount Drainage
businesses.known_for: Specialist drainage: blocked drain clearance, residential and commercial drainlaying, CCTV inspections, soakpits and EQC/insurance assessments.

businesses.name: Rohland Plumbing
businesses.known_for: High-standard workmanship on hot water cylinders, burst pipes, blocked drains, toilet repairs and bathroom renovations; Master Plumbers member.

businesses.name: DCS Plumbing Ltd
businesses.known_for: Small two-person operation with 25 years experience; specialises in domestic renovations, maintenance and occasional new builds.
